subtitle: Beyond these listed publications, explore deeper insights on my research blog.

items.title: Gender Recognition of Bangla Names Using Deep Learning Approaches Appl. Sci. 2023
items.description: Investigates deep learning techniques for predicting gender from Bengali names, highlighting challenges in low-resource language contexts.

items.title: Named entity classification using dependency grammar - ICCIT-2017
items.description: Presents a hybrid approach combining dependency grammar and LSTM-based models for named entity recognition and classification in English text, published at IEEE ICCIT 2017.

items.title: Recognition of Bangla handwriting characters using Convolutional Neural Network
items.description: Undergraduate thesis focused on handwritten Bangla character recognition using convolutional neural networks, addressing challenges in script variability and image-based classification.
